Generated Narrative: ConceptMap TWHealthCheckLaboratoryMap

Mapping from 健康檢查核心項目值集 to 健康檢查核心項目值集


Group 1 Mapping from Logical Observation Identifiers, Names and Codes (LOINC) to Logical Observation Identifiers, Names and Codes (LOINC)

Source CodeRelationshipTarget CodeComment
804-5 (WBC [#/volume] in Blood by Manual count)is equivalent to6690-2 (Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood)
26464-8 (WBC [#/volume] in Blood)is equivalent to6690-2 (Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood)
2888-6 (Protein [Mass/volume] in Urine)maps to wider concept5804-0 (Protein [Presence] in Urine by Test strip)
2339-0 (Glucose [Mass/volume] in Blood)maps to wider concept1558-6 (Fasting Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
38483-4 (Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Blood)is equivalent to2160-0 (Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
49154-8 (Uric acid [Mass/volume] in Blood)is equivalent to3084-1 (Uric acid [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
35200-5 (Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Blood)is equivalent to2093-3 (Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
3043-7 (Triglyceride [Mass/volume] in Blood)is equivalent to2571-8 (Triglyceride [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
3048-6 (Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Blood)is equivalent to2085-9 (Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
18262-6 (Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay)is equivalent to13457-7 (Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by calculation)
33914-3 (Glomerular filtration rate/1.73 sq M.predicted by MDRD equation)is equivalent to88293-6 (Glomerular filtration rate/1.73 sq M.predicted by Creatinine-based formula (CKD-EPI 2021))
22326-3 (Hepatitis B virus surface Ag [Presence] in Serum or Plasma)is equivalent to5196-1 (Hepatitis B virus surface Ag [Presence] in Serum)
47365-2 (Hepatitis C virus Ab [Presence] in Blood)is equivalent to13955-0 (Hepatitis C virus Ab [Presence] in Serum or Plasma)
26515-7 (Platelets [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count)is equivalent to777-3 (Platelets [#/volume] in Blood)
30428-7 (MCV [Entitic volume] by calculation)is equivalent to787-2 (MCV [Entitic volume] by Automated count)
28539-5 (MCH [Entitic mass] by Automated count)is equivalent to785-6 (MCH [Entitic mass] by Automated count)
26508-2 (Neutrophils/100 leukocytes in Blood by Manual count)is equivalent to770-8 (Neutrophils/100 leukocytes in Blood by Automated count)
14409-7 (Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma by UV with P5P)is equivalent to1920-8 (Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
14390-9 (Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma by UV with P5P)is equivalent to1742-6 (Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
1783-0 (Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma)is equivalent to6768-6 (Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
59261-8 (Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by IFCC protocol)is equivalent to4548-4 (Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood)Unit conversion required: NGSP(%) = IFCC(mmol/mol) * 0.9148 + 2.152
3016-3 (Thyrotropin [Units/volume] in Serum or Plasma by 3rd IS)is equivalent to11580-8 (Thyrotropin [Units/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
19199-9 (Prostate specific Ag [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma)is equivalent to2857-1 (Prostate specific Ag [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
83085-1 (Cancer Ag 125 [Units/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Immunoassay)is equivalent to10334-1 (Cancer Ag 125 [Units/volume] in Serum or Plasma)
